questions.question: Describe the importance of proper disposal of electronic waste. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Proper disposal of electronic waste helps in reducing pollution, conserving natural resources, and preventing health hazards.

questions.question: What are the main components of e-waste? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The main components of e-waste include batteries, cables, printed circuit boards, and other electronic devices.

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'Design for Disassembly' in e-waste management. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Design for Disassembly is a concept that involves designing products in such a way that they can be easily disassembled and recycled at the end of their life cycle, reducing waste and promoting sustainability.
